top_signals.title: UK Borrowing Overshoots in Warning to New Burnham Government
top_signals.summary: Britain borrowed more than forecast in the first three months of the fiscal year, a reminder to new Chancellor of the Exchequer John Healey of the challenges he faces to keep the public finances on track.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Jamie Dimon says markets underestimate risks and he wouldn't buy stocks or Treasurys at current prices
top_signals.summary: Comments from JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon contrast with investors' recent willingness to look past wars, tariffs and other shocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK Parliament begins inquiry into banking chokepoint for crypto businesses
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Brazil’s securities regulator sets up task force with 60-day deadline for tokenization proposal
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: The FDA made a big reversal in its cyclosporiasis probe, but it still thinks iceberg lettuce is to blame
top_signals.summary: The FDA's investigation into the source of the cyclosporiasis outbreak is causing confusion as companies and consumers alike navigate new updates.
